meta.summary: Genome Analysis Toolkit 4 for germline and somatic variant discovery, genotyping, filtering, and related genomics workflows.
meta.description: Genome Analysis Toolkit 4 for germline and somatic variant discovery, genotyping, filtering, and related genomics workflows.

test: mkdir -p /tmp/taf-gatk-dict && cd /tmp/taf-gatk-dict && printf '>chr1\nACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT\n' > ref.fa && gatk CreateSequenceDictionary -R ref.fa -O ref.dict >/tmp/taf-gatk-dict.log 2>&1 && test -s ref.dict && grep -F '@SQ' ref.dict >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-gatk-vcf && cd /tmp/taf-gatk-vcf && printf '##fileformat=VCFv4.2
##contig=<ID=chr1,length=20>
#CHROM	POS	ID	REF	ALT	QUAL	FILTER	INFO
chr1	5	.	A	T	30	PASS	.
' > tiny.vcf && gatk IndexFeatureFile -I tiny.vcf >/tmp/taf-gatk-vcf.log 2>&1 && test -s tiny.vcf.idx

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-gatk-printreads && cd /tmp/taf-gatk-printreads && printf '>chr1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
' > ref.fa && samtools faidx ref.fa && gatk CreateSequenceDictionary -R ref.fa -O ref.dict >/tmp/taf-gatk-printreads-dict.log 2>&1 && printf '@HD	VN:1.6	SO:coordinate
@SQ	SN:chr1	LN:20
@RG	ID:rg1	SM:sample1
read1	0	chr1	5	60	10M	*	0	0	ACGTACGTAC	FFFFFFFFFF	RG:Z:rg1
' > reads.sam && samtools view -bS reads.sam > reads.bam && samtools index reads.bam && gatk PrintReads -R ref.fa -I reads.bam -O out.bam >/tmp/taf-gatk-printreads.log 2>&1 && test -s out.bam && samtools view out.bam | grep -F 'read1' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-gatk-hc && cd /tmp/taf-gatk-hc && printf '>chr1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
' > ref.fa && samtools faidx ref.fa && gatk CreateSequenceDictionary -R ref.fa -O ref.dict >/tmp/taf-gatk-hc-dict.log 2>&1 && printf '@HD	VN:1.6	SO:coordinate
@SQ	SN:chr1	LN:40
@RG	ID:rg1	SM:sample1
read1	0	chr1	5	60	20M	*	0	0	ACGTTCGTACGTACGTACGT	FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF	RG:Z:rg1
read2	0	chr1	5	60	20M	*	0	0	ACGTTCGTACGTACGTACGT	FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF	RG:Z:rg1
read3	0	chr1	5	60	20M	*	0	0	ACGTTCGTACGTACGTACGT	FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF	RG:Z:rg1
read4	0	chr1	5	60	20M	*	0	0	ACGTTCGTACGTACGTACGT	FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF	RG:Z:rg1
' > reads.sam && samtools view -bS reads.sam > reads.bam && samtools index reads.bam && gatk HaplotypeCaller -R ref.fa -I reads.bam -O calls.vcf >/tmp/taf-gatk-hc.log 2>&1 && test -s calls.vcf && grep -F '#CHROM' calls.vcf >/dev/null
